lead.business: Financial & Tax Planning | BFS Advisory Group
lead.description: BFS ADVISORY GROUP IS A TEAM WITH A COLLECTIVE MISSION TO SERVE OTHERS. We are fiduciaries and good stewards who put our clients’ interests and financial well-being above our own. We proudly share five core values: integrity, empathy, future focus, independence and authenticity. Our mission and values shine in our processes, our commitment to hiring individuals with CFP ® and CFA ® designations, and how we choose clients. WE HELP OUR CLIENTS BUILD A FRAMEWORK FOR THOUGHTFUL DECISIONS ABOUT THEIR FINANCIAL PLANS THROUGH A PROPRIETARY PLANNING PROCESS WE CALL THE DBT360 FINANCIAL PLAN.
